task_description: Phase 3 - Engine Setup & Game Loop: Convert the project to Gradle with libGDX, create the complete view layer with pixel-perfect rendering, screen management, input handling, HUD, message log, combat menu, animation queue, and placeholder assets - all bridging the existing non-blocking CombatEngine to a 60 FPS render loop.

verification.summary: ./gradlew classes passes. No model/controller files modified. No Thread.sleep in view layer. No game logic in view layer. All 15 view files compile cleanly with libGDX 1.12.1. Semantic review v2 APPROVED after all 7 v1 issues resolved.
